violations.text: The screen door to the outside, located in bar area, is not tight-fitting. Door needs screen repaired/replaced and door sweep to be added. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025
Boxes of chips/cups were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. PIC stated ice machine will be turned off and cleaned tonight. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

At the time of inspection, the bar area was observed to be lacking a hand-washing sink. A dedicated hand sink is to be installed at the bar. Per conversation on phone with director, hand sink is to be installed. PIC to contact inspector when installation is complete. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2023
At the time of inspection, the bar area was observed to be lacking a hand-washing sink. A dedicated hand sink is to be installed at the bar. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2023
